zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Tunstall於大約1405年出生在英國藍卡爾彤絲朵時，她的父親Sir Thomas Tunstall46歲，母親Isabel Harington38歲。她於1420年與Sir Thomas Parr在英國英格蘭藍卡爾瑟藍德 卡素結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1490年在英國維斯特莫藍德享年86歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Tunstall于大约1405年出生在英国藍卡爾彤絲朵时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Tunstall46岁，母亲Isabel Harington38岁。她于1420年与Sir Thomas Parr在英国英格兰藍卡爾瑟藍德 卡素结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1490年在英国維斯特莫藍德享年86岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Tunstall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): habitational name from any of various places called with Old English tūn-stall ‘site of a farm, farmstead’, notably Tunstall (Lancashire) and one or more of many Staffordshire places (Tunstall near Stoke on Trent, Tunstall near Adbaston, and four places called Dunstall), but also Tunstall Farm in Mountfield (Sussex) and possibly also Tunstall (Durham, Kent, Norfolk, Shropshire, Suffolk, east and North Yorkshire), and Dunstall (Lincolnshire).

variants.name: Tunstill
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Tunstall  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Tunstall was born about 1405, in Tunstall, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Tunstall, was 46 and her mother, Isabel Harington, was 38. She married Sir Thomas Parr in 1420, in Thurland Castle, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1490, in Westmorland, England, at the age of 86, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Tunstall est née environ 1405, à Tunstall, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Tunstall, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Isabel Harington, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Parr en 1420, à Thurland Castle, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1490, à Westmorland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Thurland Castle, Lancashire, England: Thurland Castle, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Tunstall um 1405 in Tunstall, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Tunstall 46 und ihre Mutter Isabel Harington 38. Sie hat 1420 in Thurland Castle, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Parr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1490 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Westmorland, England und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Tunstall è nata il circa 1405 nel Tunstall, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Tunstall, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Isabel Harington, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Parr nel 1420, nel Thurland Castle, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1490, nel Westmorland, England, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Tunstallが約1405年にイギリスランカシュアイアトゥンスタルで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Tunstallは46歳，母Isabel Haringtonは38歳であった。1420年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアスウルランド カストルでSir Thomas Parrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1490年にイギリスウエストモーランドで86歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Tunstall(이)가 대략 1405년 영국 랭카실르 툰스탤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Tunstall(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Harington(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 스를랜드 카스틀에서 Sir Thomas Parr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1490년 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Tunstall nasceu aproximadamente 1405, em Tunstall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Tunstall, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Harington, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Parr em 1420, em Thurland Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1490, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, com 86 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Thurland Castle, Lancashire, England: Thurland Castle, Lancashire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Tunstall родилась около 1405 г. в местности тунсталл, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Tunstall было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Harington, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Parr в 1420 г. в местности турланд кастл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1490 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Tunstall nació aproximadamente 1405, en Tunstall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Tunstall, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Isabel Harington, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Parr en 1420, en Thurland Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1490, en Westmorland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
